data.body:
Goal:
Operators can't tell what binary is on a host vs. what shipped a fix without
this. Bare-minimum operability.

Verification:
1. `thimble --version` and `thimble version` both print: `thimble vX.Y.Z (commit abc1234, built 2026-05-07T14:00:00Z, go1.25.0)`.
2. Release workflow injects version/commit/date via `-ldflags="-X main.version=…"` etc.
3. Local builds without ldflags print `dev` for version and the git short SHA if available, otherwise `unknown`.

Constraints:
- Knot ref: K-28; wave/step 4.11; effort S; risk low
- Files: internal/cli/, .github/workflows/release.yml
- Depends on: K-12
- Notes: Cheap, high-value, frequently the first thing on an operator's checklist.
data.title: `thimble --version` subcommand
